← All work Featured Project · 2025

Choice
Inventory

Premium inventory services for letting agents, landlords, and tenants — a confident, conversion-led site that turns first-time visitors into bookings.

Client Choice Inventory
Scope Brand site, design + build
Stack Hand-coded, Vite
Visit live site →

The brief.

Choice Inventory came in with a template site that didn't reflect the premium-end of the property services market they actually serve. Letting agents were bouncing because the site felt cheap; landlords couldn't tell what made the service different from any other inventory clerk.

The rebuild leans into confidence: bold typography, a saturated brand palette, accreditations surfaced where they matter, and a booking flow that takes three clicks. Hand-coded for speed and SEO, with structured data baked in.

Next project Clinical Assessments →
